_doc: Probes for dim 4 (memory recall over time). Plant a fact in week 1, query it in week 2.

plants.title: Internal probe: model code-name BIRCH-7
plants.body_md: PROBE_FACT_BIRCH_7: A new internal model code-named BIRCH-7 is referenced in long-running agent benchmark numbers. The agent should remember this code-name when asked about it later.

queries.query_prompt: Have any internal model code-names appeared in the items you've reviewed in the past two weeks?
